title: Delta Air Lines hit with proposed class action over carbon neutral claims
text: The lawsuit comes three years after Delta announced it would go fully carbon neutral, which means it would cancel out all of the emissions it produces.

title: Delta Air Lines faces possible lawsuit over carbon-neutral claims
text: Delta Air Lines is facing a possible class action lawsuit over its carbon-neutral claims.

title: Lawsuit challenges Delta Air Lines' claims of carbon neutrality, says offsets were bogus
text: A consumer class action lawsuit filed Tuesday claims Delta Air Lines inaccurately billed itself as the world's “first carbon-neutral airline” and should pay damages. The complaint in federal court in California alleges the airline relied on carbon offsets that were largely bogus.

title: Wall Street Bulls Look Optimistic About Delta (DAL): Should You Buy?
text: Investors often turn to recommendations made by Wall Street analysts before making a Buy, Sell, or Hold decision about a stock. While media reports about rating changes by these brokerage-firm employed (or sell-side) analysts often affect a stock's price, do they really matter?

title: You, AI, and the Brands You Love
text: LivePerson's Rob LoCascio helps us see the future.

title: Airline stocks could soar this summer if Memorial Day weekend projections are a sign of things to come
text: More than 42 million Americans are expected to travel this Memorial Day weekend according to AAA, which would be 7% more than 2022 and the third-highest ever.  Amid all the flying, there are investment opportunities to be spotted from 30,000 feet.

title: Airlines are bracing for a busy summer travel season — here's what to expect
text: U.S. airlines are bracing for a travel surge this summer, hoping for a smoother season after last summer was marred by delays and cancellations, pilot and crew shortages, and rising fuel prices.

title: Delta names former Six Flags executive its new COO
text: Delta Air Lines Inc. DAL, +1.27% said late Tuesday that Michael Spanos, 58, has been named the company's chief operating officer, effective June 12. Spanos served as chief executive officer of Six Flags Entertainment Corp. SIX, -1.90% from November 2019 to November 2021, Delta said, and prior to joining the amusement park company spent more than 25 years as an executive at PepsiCo Inc. Shares of Delta were flat in the extended session after ending the regular trading day up 1.3%.

title: Delta Is a Big Winner After American and JetBlue Partnership Blocked
text: The two carriers set up the alliance to better compete with Delta Air Lines and United Airlines in New York and Boston.

title: Why Airlines and the Companies That Serve Them Are Flying High Today
text: Federal regulators are expecting a busy start to the summer travel season. That's bad news for travelers, but great news for airlines counting on a strong vacation season.

title: Thoughts On When To Sell A Dividend Stock
text: We don't buy stocks to look for a selling point as dividend investors. Our holding period is for life. However, as you become more experienced and learn from investing mistakes, there are times when you should sell a dividend stock.

title: Delta Air Lines: Significant Upside Potential (Rating Upgrade)

title: Are airlines doing anything for the planet? Not so much.
text: Four years ago, electric vehicles were still a niche industry, accounting for 1.4% of total vehicle sales in the U.S., according to a report from CleanTechnica, a website covering the cleantech industry. That number, according to the report, quadrupled by 2022, and the Biden administration recently proposed new rules that would make two-thirds of passenger vehicle sales electric by 2032.

title: A Look at Transport ETFs Post Q1 Earnings
text: The first-quarter earnings picture for the transportation sector has been solid. This is especially true as the sector is the largest contributor to the earnings growth so far.

title: How U.S. airlines make $7 billion a year from checked bags

title: Forget Mixed Airlines Earnings: Play JETS ETF on Upbeat Outlook
